ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of checking a box.  The robot will use its right arm to make a decisive downward check mark motion. The left arm will remain at rest. This will make the action clear and unambiguous. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed at the sides, setting the stage. Frame 2 shows the right arm beginning its downward motion, creating anticipation. Frame 3 shows the right arm making the check mark, completing the action. Frame 4 shows the arm returning to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready
right arm begins to move down decisively
the right arm sweeps down, making the check
both arms settle back into stillness
